title: Not only... but (also)...

formulas.formula: Not only + 助動詞/be動詞 + S₁ + ..., but (also) + S₂ + V₂ ...
formulas.zh: 不只……而且……（主詞不同，not only 置於句首時須倒裝）

formulas.formula: S + V + not only + A + but (also) + B
formulas.zh: 不只A而且B（連接對等的詞或片語，不需倒裝）

explanation: 「Not only A but also B」用來強調「不只……而且……」，可連接對等的名詞、形容詞、動詞或子句。當 not only 置於句首時，該子句須使用倒裝語序（助動詞或 be 動詞移至主詞前），但 but also 引導的子句維持正常語序。動詞一致性依「就近原則」，動詞須與靠近的主詞 B 一致。also 可省略，but 不可省略。此句型常見於寫作中用以加強語氣與論述力道。

examples.eng: Not only does she speak English fluently, but she also writes beautifully.
examples.chi: 她不只英文說得流利，而且寫得也很優美。

examples.eng: The movie is not only entertaining but also thought-provoking.
examples.chi: 這部電影不只有娛樂性，而且發人深省。

examples.eng: Not only did the typhoon destroy houses, but it also caused serious flooding.
examples.chi: 那場颱風不只摧毀了房屋，還造成了嚴重的水災。

examples.eng: Not only the students but also the teacher was surprised by the result.
examples.chi: 不只學生，連老師也對結果感到驚訝。

extension.tip: 判斷是否倒裝的關鍵：看 not only 的位置。若 not only 放在句首引導子句，該子句必須倒裝（助動詞提前）；若 not only 放在句中連接對等詞組（名詞、形容詞等），則不需倒裝。動詞看 B（就近原則）。

examples.test: Not only she speaks English but also French. ❌
examples.result: → Not only does she speak English, but she also speaks French. ✅（not only 置於句首須倒裝）

examples.test: Not only the teachers but also the principal were present. ❌
examples.result: → Not only the teachers but also the principal was present. ✅（動詞須與就近主詞 the principal 一致，用 was）

examples.test: He not only sings but also dances on stage.
examples.result: → 正確。not only 在句中連接兩個動詞，不需倒裝，語序正常。

extension.note: 句首 not only 要倒裝，動詞跟著 B 走（就近原則）！

parts: he good at math, but he is also talented in music.
exercises.sentence: Not only is he good at math, but he is also talented in music.
exercises.translation: 他不只擅長數學，而且在音樂方面也很有天分。

parts: they clean the park, but they also planted many trees.
exercises.sentence: Not only did they clean the park, but they also planted many trees.
exercises.translation: 他們不只清掃了公園，還種了許多樹。

exercises.sentence: This app is not only free but also easy to use.
exercises.translation: 這個應用程式不只免費，而且容易使用。

parts: Not only you but also your sister
exercises.sentence: Not only you but also your sister is invited to the party.
exercises.translation: 不只你，你的姊姊也被邀請參加派對。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的「不只……而且……」句型填空
mc_exercises.question_eng: Not only _______ she study hard, but she also helps her classmates.
mc_exercises.explanation: 句首使用 not only 需倒裝，助動詞 does 須移至主詞 she 前。B 項 is 與原句動詞 study 不符；C 項 has 為完成式，語義不當；D 項 can 為情態動詞，不符倒裝結構。正確答案是 A。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷句型中連接詞的正確用法
mc_exercises.question_eng: The book is not only informative _______ also inspiring to read.
mc_exercises.explanation: not only...but (also) 句型中，but 為必要連接詞，不可省略。A 項 yet 改變語義為對比；C 項 and 不符該句型結構；D 項 or 表選擇，語意錯誤。正確答案是 B。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 辨析句首倒裝與非倒裝的差異
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ he is talented _______ hardworking, so he achieved great success.
mc_exercises.explanation: 句首 not only 後的子句需倒裝（is he），but also 引導的子句維持正常語序（he is hardworking）。B 項倒裝位置錯誤；C 項用 and 取代 but，違反句型規則；D 項詞序完全錯誤。正確答案是 A。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複雜句型中動詞一致性與倒裝的綜合應用
mc_exercises.question_eng: Not only _______ the students impressed by the teacher's lecture, but the parents _______ satisfied with the school's curriculum.
mc_exercises.explanation: 句首倒裝子句主詞為 the students（複數），be 動詞用 were；but also 子句主詞為 the parents（複數），be 動詞用 are。此句型中動詞應與各自的主詞一致，不遵循就近原則。A 項後半錯誤；B、C 項前半錯誤。正確答案是 D。
